_comment: Body sent from StubAiService to POST /api/ai/regenerate.
Built by RegenerationService.RegenerateAsync() from the resume's stored FinalData.
sectionIdentifier  – the key inside finalData.content to patch (must match exactly).
userPrompt         – the instruction the user typed in the Regenerate dialog.
targetFormat       – optional: if set, updates settings.descriptionFormat after save.
newTitleSuggestion – hint for the AI; not directly saved, used only as context.
currentSectionContent – JSON.stringify of content[sectionIdentifier] before the call.
resumeTitle        – personal.title or 'FirstName LastName', for coherent AI context.
skills             – comma-joined skills array, for coherent AI context.

SCENARIO_1_summary.userPrompt: Make it more concise and achievement-focused. Highlight cloud architecture skills.
SCENARIO_1_summary.currentSectionContent: "AI-Polished: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of expertise delivering high-availability backend systems and microservices."
SCENARIO_1_summary.skills: C#, .NET 9, ASP.NET Core, React, SQL Server, Azure, Docker

SCENARIO_2_experience_section.userPrompt: Rewrite all experience descriptions with stronger action verbs and quantified outcomes.
SCENARIO_2_experience_section.skills: C#, .NET 9, ASP.NET Core, React, SQL Server, Azure, Docker

SCENARIO_2b_single_experience_entry._note: Regenerate just one experience entry by its id. The service will find exp_002 inside content['experience'] and update its description in-place.
SCENARIO_2b_single_experience_entry.userPrompt: Make this role sound more impactful with metrics and action verbs.
SCENARIO_2b_single_experience_entry.currentSectionContent: {"id":"exp_002","title":"Backend Developer","company":"Nexora Ltd","startDate":"2020-06","current":true,"description":"Worked on REST APIs and maintained backend services."}
SCENARIO_2b_single_experience_entry.skills: C#, .NET 9, ASP.NET Core, React, SQL Server, Azure, Docker

SCENARIO_3_skills.userPrompt: Reorder by relevance for a backend .NET role. Group related technologies.
SCENARIO_3_skills.skills: C#, .NET 9, ASP.NET Core, React, SQL Server, Azure, Docker
